name: maptheisland
description: Phase 01 platform foundation baseline for the MapTheIsland platform.

scripts.typecheck:py: uv run mypy libs/schemas/src libs/contracts/src libs/policy/src tests
scripts.check:py: pnpm lint:py && pnpm typecheck:py && pnpm test:py
scripts.setup:helm:repos: sh -c 'helm repo add argo https://argoproj.github.io/argo-helm --force-update >/dev/null && helm repo add external-secrets https://charts.external-secrets.io --force-update >/dev/null && helm repo add hashicorp https://helm.releases.hashicorp.com --force-update >/dev/null && helm repo add jetstack https://charts.jetstack.io --force-update >/dev/null && helm repo update >/dev/null'
scripts.validate:tf:dev: sh -c 'TF_DATA_DIR=$PWD/.terraform-cache/dev terraform -chdir=infra/terraform/environments/dev init -backend=false >/dev/null && TF_DATA_DIR=$PWD/.terraform-cache/dev terraform -chdir=infra/terraform/environments/dev validate'
scripts.check:infra: pnpm lint:tf && pnpm validate:tf:dev && pnpm lint:helm && pnpm template:helm:kind-dev
scripts.template:cert-manager:local: sh -c 'helm template maptheisland-cert-manager jetstack/cert-manager --version v1.19.4 --namespace maptheisland-dev-foundation-system -f infra/helm/values/control-plane/cert-manager.local-values.yaml >/dev/null'
scripts.check:control-plane: pnpm setup:helm:repos && pnpm template:argocd:local && pnpm template:external-secrets:local && pnpm template:vault:local && pnpm template:cert-manager:local
scripts.create:kind:dev: sh -c 'mkdir -p .state/kind && kind create cluster --name maptheisland-dev --config infra/kind/dev-cluster.yaml --kubeconfig .state/kind/kubeconfig'
scripts.delete:kind:dev: sh -c 'kind delete cluster --name maptheisland-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && rm -f .state/kind/kubeconfig'
scripts.check:kind:nodes: sh -c 'KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl wait --for=condition=Ready nodes --all --timeout=120s >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl get nodes -L maptheisland.io/nodepool'
scripts.apply:kind:foundation: sh -c 'KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig helm upgrade --install maptheisland-platform infra/helm/charts/platform-foundation --namespace maptheisland-dev-foundation-system --create-namespace -f infra/helm/charts/platform-foundation/values.kind-dev.yaml'
scripts.check:kind:foundation: sh -c 'helm template maptheisland-platform infra/helm/charts/platform-foundation -f infra/helm/charts/platform-foundation/values.kind-dev.yaml | KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl apply --dry-run=server -f - >/dev/null'
scripts.apply:kind:argocd: sh -c 'pnpm setup:helm:repos >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig helm upgrade --install maptheisland-argocd argo/argo-cd --version 9.4.7 --namespace maptheisland-dev-foundation-system --create-namespace -f infra/helm/values/control-plane/argocd.local-values.yaml >/dev/null'
scripts.check:kind:argocd:bootstrap: sh -c 'KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-foundation-system wait --for=condition=Available deployment/maptheisland-argocd-server --timeout=180s >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl apply --dry-run=server -f infra/gitops/bootstrap/local >/dev/null'
scripts.apply:kind:argocd:gitops: sh -c 'KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-foundation-system wait --for=condition=Available deployment/maptheisland-argocd-server deployment/maptheisland-argocd-repo-server --timeout=180s >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-foundation-system rollout status statefulset/maptheisland-argocd-application-controller --timeout=180s >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl apply -f infra/gitops/bootstrap/local >/dev/null'
scripts.bootstrap:kind:vault:token: sh -c 'mkdir -p .state/kind && test -f .state/kind/vault-root-token || openssl rand -hex 32 > .state/kind/vault-root-token && test -f .state/kind/sample-service-api-token || openssl rand -hex 24 > .state/kind/sample-service-api-token'
scripts.apply:kind:cert-manager: sh -c 'pnpm setup:helm:repos >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig helm upgrade --install maptheisland-cert-manager jetstack/cert-manager --version v1.19.4 --namespace maptheisland-dev-foundation-system --create-namespace -f infra/helm/values/control-plane/cert-manager.local-values.yaml >/dev/null'
scripts.apply:kind:vault: sh -c 'pnpm setup:helm:repos >/dev/null && pnpm bootstrap:kind:vault:token >/dev/null && TOKEN=$(cat .state/kind/vault-root-token) && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig helm upgrade --install maptheisland-vault hashicorp/vault --version 0.32.0 --namespace maptheisland-dev-foundation-system --create-namespace -f infra/helm/values/control-plane/vault.local-values.yaml --set server.dev.devRootToken=$TOKEN >/dev/null'
scripts.apply:kind:external-secrets: sh -c 'pnpm setup:helm:repos >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig helm upgrade --install maptheisland-external-secrets external-secrets/external-secrets --version 2.0.1 --namespace maptheisland-dev-foundation-system --create-namespace -f infra/helm/values/control-plane/external-secrets.local-values.yaml >/dev/null'
scripts.bootstrap:kind:vault:sample-secret: sh -c 'pnpm bootstrap:kind:vault:token >/dev/null && TOKEN=$(cat .state/kind/vault-root-token) && SAMPLE_TOKEN=$(cat .state/kind/sample-service-api-token) && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-foundation-system create secret generic maptheisland-local-vault-token --from-literal=token=$TOKEN --dry-run=client -o yaml | KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl apply -f - >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-foundation-system wait --for=condition=Ready pod -l app.kubernetes.io/instance=maptheisland-vault,component=server --timeout=180s >/dev/null && POD=$(KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-foundation-system get pod -l app.kubernetes.io/instance=maptheisland-vault,component=server -o jsonpath={.items[0].metadata.name}) && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-foundation-system exec $POD -- sh -c "export VAULT_ADDR=http://127.0.0.1:8200 VAULT_TOKEN=$TOKEN && vault kv put secret/maptheisland/local/sample-service api_token=$SAMPLE_TOKEN >/dev/null"'
scripts.apply:kind:sample-secret-consumer: sh -c 'KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-foundation-system wait --for=condition=Available deployment/maptheisland-cert-manager deployment/maptheisland-cert-manager-webhook deployment/maptheisland-external-secrets deployment/maptheisland-external-secrets-webhook deployment/maptheisland-external-secrets-cert-controller --timeout=180s >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl apply -f infra/gitops/apps/local/sample-secret-consumer >/dev/null'
scripts.check:kind:argocd:remote-reconciliation: sh -c 'EXPECTED_REVISION=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && NS=maptheisland-dev-foundation-system && KC=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig && wait_app_synced(){ KUBECONFIG=$KC kubectl -n "$NS" wait --for=jsonpath="{.status.sync.status}"=Synced "application/$1" --timeout=300s >/dev/null; } && wait_app_healthy(){ KUBECONFIG=$KC kubectl -n "$NS" wait --for=jsonpath="{.status.health.status}"=Healthy "application/$1" --timeout=300s >/dev/null; } && wait_revision(){ APP=$1 && ATTEMPTS=0 && until KUBECONFIG=$KC kubectl -n "$NS" get "application/$APP" -o jsonpath="{.status.sync.revision} {.status.sync.revisions}" 2>/dev/null | grep -F "$EXPECTED_REVISION" >/dev/null; do ATTEMPTS=$((ATTEMPTS + 1)); if [ "$ATTEMPTS" -ge 60 ]; then echo "Expected revision $EXPECTED_REVISION not reported for $APP" >&2; exit 1; fi; sleep 5; done; } && KUBECONFIG=$KC kubectl -n "$NS" wait --for=condition=Available deployment/maptheisland-argocd-server deployment/maptheisland-argocd-repo-server --timeout=180s >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$KC kubectl -n "$NS" rollout status statefulset/maptheisland-argocd-application-controller --timeout=180s >/dev/null && wait_app_synced maptheisland-local-bootstrap && wait_revision maptheisland-local-bootstrap && for APP in maptheisland-local-platform-foundation maptheisland-local-argocd maptheisland-local-cert-manager maptheisland-local-vault maptheisland-local-external-secrets; do wait_app_synced "$APP" && wait_revision "$APP" && wait_app_healthy "$APP"; done && pnpm bootstrap:kind:vault:sample-secret >/dev/null && wait_app_synced maptheisland-local-sample-secret-consumer && wait_revision maptheisland-local-sample-secret-consumer && wait_app_healthy maptheisland-local-sample-secret-consumer && wait_app_healthy maptheisland-local-bootstrap && KUBECONFIG=$KC kubectl get clustersecretstore.external-secrets.io/maptheisland-local-vault clusterissuer.cert-manager.io/maptheisland-local-selfsigned >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$KC kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-application wait --for=condition=Ready certificate/maptheisland-local-sample-certificate --timeout=180s >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$KC kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-application wait --for=condition=Ready externalsecret/maptheisland-local-sample-secret --timeout=180s >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$KC kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-application wait --for=condition=Available deployment/maptheisland-local-sample-consumer --timeout=180s >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$KC kubectl -n "$NS" get applications'
scripts.check:kind:sample-secret-consumer: sh -c 'KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-foundation-system wait --for=condition=Available deployment/maptheisland-cert-manager --timeout=180s >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-foundation-system wait --for=condition=Available deployment/maptheisland-external-secrets --timeout=180s >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-application wait --for=condition=Ready certificate/maptheisland-local-sample-certificate --timeout=180s >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-application wait --for=condition=Ready externalsecret/maptheisland-local-sample-secret --timeout=180s >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-application wait --for=condition=Available deployment/maptheisland-local-sample-consumer --timeout=180s >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-application get secret maptheisland-local-sample-runtime >/dev/null && KUBECONFIG=$PWD/.state/kind/kubeconfig kubectl -n maptheisland-dev-application get secret maptheisland-local-sample-tls >/dev/null'
